LAW AND MOTION 302, 1-DEFENDANTS VITALII MALIUK AN INDIVIDUAL, AND ARVIAN LAW FIRM LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS VITALII MALIUK AND ARVIAN LAW FIRM LLC'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF EXHIBITS 1 AND 2 IS GRANTED. THEIR REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF EXHIBITS 3, 4 & 5 IS DENIED. THE EXHIBITS ARE NOT AUTHENTICATED AND NO FOUNDATION IS PROVIDED. (SEE MINI-MINUTES AND WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

LAW AND MOTION 302, 2-DEFENDANTS VITALII MALIUK AN INDIVIDUAL, AND ARVIAN LAW FIRM LLC'S MOTION TO RECLASSIFY THIS ACTION FROM UNLIMITED TO LIMITED CIVIL ACTION. DEFENDANTS VITALII MALIUK AND ARVIAN LAW FIRM LLC'S MOTION TO RECLASSIFY IS DENIED. (SEE MINI-MINUTES AND WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
